title: Payer Scorecard pipeline: canonical naming from ERAs/PDFs, alias for ambiguous payers, deterministic performance grading, board_relation gotcha
summary: Payer Scorecard pipeline: SQL view of per-payer monthly metrics with deterministic A-F grade, payer_alias crosswalk for ambiguous PDF text (CIGNA defaults to CIGNA HEALTHCARE without unifying CIGNA HEALTHSPRING), multi-pass backfill from 23% to 100% coverage with only exact source data, rule that ERA/PDF text is canonical over seed master names, board_relation column gotcha (text/value null, use linked_item_ids fragment), and self-contained writer pattern with dedupe_key upsert for view-driven Monday boards.
